notes: Important: Manual update required for this version - Please download the latest Setup and reinstall (or apply the update manually by extracting the update.zip to the app root). Your settings and playlists will be preserved. Future updates will work normally.
Stage Presence - A major Image Viewer overhaul with dramatically smoother performance, new shader presets, and visual effects.
NEW Dual-Process Image Viewer - UI and rendering now run independently for smoother visuals and improved responsiveness.
NEW Shader Presets - 12 new presets including Flame, Lava Lamp, Rainbow, Plasma Vortex, Geometry Dive, and more.
NEW Effect Cycling - Automatically cycle shaders and particle effects by timer, track, or URL. Effects can also use your theme's accent color.
Quality of Life - Optional silent enrichment, cleaner search status, and a Nano playlist layout fix.
Thanks - Special thanks to alabx for testing, feedback, and issue reporting.
